"x" : "y", 58 }, 59 plugins 60 ) 61 const [canScrollPrev, setCanScrollPrev] = React.useState(false) 62 const [canScrollNext, setCanScrollNext] = React.useState(false) 63 64 const onSelect = React.useCallback((api: CarouselApi) => { 65 if (!api) return 66 setCanScrollPrev(api.canScrollPrev()) 67 setCanScrollNext(api.canScrollNext()) 68 }, []) 69 70 const scrollPrev = React.useCallback(() => { 71 api?.scrollPrev() 72 }, [api]) 73 74 const scrollNext = React.useCallback(() => { 75 api?.scrollNext() 76 }, [api]) 77 78 const handleKeyDown = React.useCallback( 79 (event: React.KeyboardEvent) => { 80 if (event.key === "ArrowLeft") { 81 event.preventDefault() 82 scrollPrev() 83 } else if (event.key === "ArrowRight") { 84 event.preventDefault() 85 scrollNext() 86 } 87 }, 88 [scrollPrev, scrollNext] 89 ) 90 91 React.useEffect(() => { 92 if (!api || !setApi) return 93 setApi(api) 94 }, [api, setApi]) 95 96 React.useEffect(() => { 97 if (!api) return 98 onSelect(api) 99 api.on("reInit", onSelect) 100 api.on("select", onSelect) 101 102 return () => { 103 api?.off("select", onSelect) 104 } 105 }, [api, onSelect]) 106 107 return ( 108 121

9	  return `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL}${path}`

content.text:
Both entries are in place. Here's a summary of everything created: --- ## What was created ### `apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/ui/stepper.tsx` — the compound component **React context (two layers):** - `StepperContext` — shares `activeStep` and `orientation` with the entire subtree; `useStepper()` hook throws if used outside `` - `StepperItemContext` — shares the item's `step` number so `StepperTrigger` and `StepperSeparator` know which step they belong to; `useStepperItem()` hook throws if used outside `` **`cva` variant** for `StepperTrigger` with three `state` variants: `pending` (hollow/grey border), `active` (filled primary), `completed` (filled primary). **Each exported part:** | Export | Element | `data-slot` | Key behaviour | |---|---|---|---| | `Stepper` | `
` | `stepper` | Provides context; `flex-row` (h) or `flex-col` (v) by default, overridable via `className` | | `StepperItem` | `
` | `stepper-item` | Sets `data-state` + `data-step`; provides item context; `relative` for separator anchoring | | `StepperTrigger` | `
